title: AN ACT CONVERTING THE RURAL HEALTH UNIT IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF ALLACAPAN, PROVINCE OF CAGAYAN, INTO A FIVE-BED CAPACITY HEALTH INFIRMARY, TO BE KNOWN AS THE ALLACAPAN HEALTH INFIRMARY, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

chunks.text:
H. No. 3309 / 88 OG No. 26, 4098 (June 29, 1992)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7456, April 27, 1992 ]

AN ACT CONVERTING THE RURAL HEALTH UNIT IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF ALLACAPAN, PROVINCE OF CAGAYAN, INTO A FIVE-BED CAPACITY HEALTH INFIRMARY, TO BE KNOWN AS THE ALLACAPAN HEALTH INFIRMARY, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The Allacapan rural health unit in the Municipality of Allacapan, Province of Cagayan, is hereby converted into a five-bed capacity health infirmary, to be known as the Allacapan Health Infirmary.

SEC. 2. The amount necessary to carry out the provisions of this Act shall be included in the General Appropriations Act of the year following its enactment into law and thereafter.

SEC. 3 This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved,

(Sgd.) NEPTALI A. GONZALES

(Sgd.)

RAMON V. MITRA

President of the Senate

Speaker of the House of Representatives

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was finally passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate on September 4, 1991 and February 3, 1992, respectively.

(Sgd.)

ANACLETO D. BADOY, JR.

(Sgd.)

CAMILO L. SABIO

Secretary of the Senate

Secretary General House of Representatives

Approved: April 27, 1992

(Sgd.)

CORAZON C. AQUINO

President of the Philippines
